column1: 1 endpoint(s). Mock definitions — assume realistic data shapes.
Core reporting endpoint. Pulls historical metrics across dimensions with filters. Foundation for traffic, engagement, conversion, and attribution analysis.

column4: What it is
column5: Why it matters

column4: Resource name 'properties/{numericPropertyId}'
column5: Which GA4 property to query?

column4: Up to 4 ranges, each {startDate, endDate, name}. Dates can be 'YYYY-MM-DD', 'NdaysAgo', 'today', 'yesterday'
column5: Which time windows to compare? (e.g. last 30d vs prior 30d)

column4: Up to 9. Each {name: 'sessionSource' | 'landingPage' | 'deviceCategory' | 'date' | 'eventName' | etc.}
column5: How do I want to slice the data — by source, by page, by device, by event?

column4: Up to 10. Each {name: 'sessions' | 'totalUsers' | 'engagementRate' | 'conversions' | 'totalRevenue' | etc.} or {expression: 'metric1/metric2'} for derived
column5: What numbers do I actually want? — sessions, conversions, revenue, custom calc?

column4: Recursive — andGroup | orGroup | notExpression | filter{fieldName, stringFilter|inListFilter|numericFilter|betweenFilter}
column5: How do I narrow rows — only organic, only landingPage matching pattern, only specific country?

column4: Same structure as dimensionFilter but applied to metric values (e.g. sessions > 100)
column5: Filter out low-volume rows? Show only high-converting?

column4: Pagination start
column5: Skip first N rows (for fetching beyond limit)

column4: Default 10,000. Max 250,000
column5: How many rows to return this call?

column4: TOTAL | MINIMUM | MAXIMUM | COUNT — adds totals/aggregates rows
column5: Do I want a totals row? Min/max for sanity checking?

column4: Each {metric|dimension|pivot, desc: bool}. Multi-key sort
column5: Sort how — by sessions descending, or alphabetical by source?

column4: ISO 4217 e.g. 'USD' — overrides property default for revenue metrics
column5: What currency to report monetary metrics in?

column4: Defines cohort dimension, ranges, granularity for cohort retention reports
column5: Build a retention cohort — e.g. users acquired in week X, engagement over 8 weeks

column4: Default false — empty rows omitted
column5: Show me zero-value combinations (useful for completeness audits)

column4: Include quota usage in response
column5: How much of my API quota have I burned?

column4: What it is
column5: Why it matters

column4: Echo of requested dimension names in order
column5: What does each row's dimension column represent?

column4: Echo of metric names
column5: What does each metric column represent?

column4: TYPE_INTEGER | TYPE_FLOAT | TYPE_SECONDS | TYPE_CURRENCY | TYPE_FEET | TYPE_MILES | TYPE_METERS | TYPE_KILOMETERS | TYPE_MILLISECONDS | TYPE_MINUTES | TYPE_HOURS | TYPE_STANDARD
column5: How do I interpret/format this metric — currency, time, distance, count?

column4: Actual value for the dimension in this row
column5: What is this row's slice — e.g. source='google', deviceCategory='mobile'

column4: Metric numeric value as string (parse to int/float per metricHeaders.type)
column5: What's the actual number for this slice?

column4: Aggregate row across all returned rows (if metricAggregations included TOTAL)
column5: What's the sum across all my filtered rows?

column4: Max/min metric values across rows
column5: What's the best/worst performing slice in this report?

column4: Total matching rows in property (may exceed returned)
column5: How many rows match my query in total — am I getting truncated?

column4: Currency used for revenue metrics
column5: What currency are revenue numbers in?

column4: Property timezone (e.g. 'America/Los_Angeles')
column5: What timezone are dates / hours reported in?

column4: Active sampling, threshold, or filter restrictions
column5: Is my data sampled? Are there thresholds suppressing rows?

column4: Quota usage if returnPropertyQuota was true
